zh.Le Lion-D'Angers,Maine-Et-Loire,France: 法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易勒 利-達朗斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri de Croÿ於1456年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德孔代-素-利斯考特時，他的父親Philippe de Croy21歲，母親Jacqueline de Luxembourg22歲。他於1494年與Charlotte de Chateaubriand在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易勒 利-達朗斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1514年享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

nameMeanings.name: Croÿ
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably originally a transferred use of the surname, which is derived from Troyes in France. Nowadays, however, the given name is principally associated with the ancient city of Troy in Asia Minor, whose fate has been a central topic in epic poetry from Homer onwards. The story tells how Troy was sacked by the Greeks after a siege of ten years; according to classical legend, a few Trojan survivors got away to found Rome (and, according to medieval legend, another group founded Britain).

en.lifeSummary: When Henri de Croÿ was born in 1456, in Condé-sur-l'Escaut, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Philippe de Croy, was 21 and his mother, Jacqueline de Luxembourg, was 22. He married Charlotte de Chateaubriand in 1494, in Le Lion-d'Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1514, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri de Croÿ est né en 1456, à Condé-sur-l'Escaut, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Philippe de Croy, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Jacqueline de Luxembourg, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Charlotte de Chateaubriand en 1494, à Le Lion-d'Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1514, à l’âge de 58 ans.

Er hat 1494 in Le Lion-d'Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich Charlotte de Chateaubriand geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1514 im Alter von 58 Jahren.

ko.Le Lion-D'Angers,Maine-Et-Loire,France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 일 리오-드'아그르스
ko.lifeSummary: Henri de Croÿ(이)가 1456년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 콘드e-수-'스카트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philippe de Croy(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Jacqueline de Luxembourg(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1494년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 일 리오-드'아그르스에서 Charlotte de Chateaubriand(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1514년 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri de Croÿ родился в 1456 г. в местности кондe-сур-л'ескаут, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Philippe de Croy было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Jacqueline de Luxembourg, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Charlotte de Chateaubriand в 1494 г. в местности л лион-д'ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1514 г. в возрасте 58 лет.
